section_name: Release on Involuntary Transfer of Title of Impounded Motor Vehicle
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.266 — Release on Involuntary Transfer of Title of Impounded Motor Vehicle

(a) Notwithstanding Section 601.262 (Duration of Impoundment) , the court shall order the release of a motor vehicle impounded under Section 601.261 (Impoundment of Motor Vehicle) if, while the vehicle is impounded, title to the vehicle is transferred by:

    (1) foreclosure;

    (2) sale on execution;

    (3) cancellation of a conditional sales contract; or

    (4) judicial order.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a

cancellation of a conditional sales contract; or
